ast.name: content
ast.source:
Take a moment to step back.
Do **NOT** start looking at entering a position until you have completed this loss review.
ast.target: 花点时间退一步思考。\n在完成这次亏损复盘之前，**切勿**考虑开仓。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Say out loud to yourself, **"losses are part of the process, there are endless opportunities in the market."**
ast.target: 大声对自己说：**“亏损是过程的一部分，市场中机会无穷无尽。”**

ast.name: content
ast.source: ***Did you stick to your trading plan without mistakes?***
ast.target: ***你是否严格遵守了交易计划，没有犯错？***

ast.name: content
ast.source: ***Be honest about how you feel and note down your emotions:***
ast.target: ***诚实地感受并记录下你的情绪：***

ast.name: content
ast.source: ***If the loss was reasonable, write down the best things you did during the trade and ways of repeating those:***
ast.target: ***如果亏损是合理的，写下你在交易中做得最好的事情以及如何重复这些做法：***

ast.name: content
ast.source: ***If the loss was unreasonable, note where you went wrong and how you'll improve next time:***
ast.target: ***如果亏损是不合理的，记录下你错在哪里以及下次如何改进：***

ast.name: content
ast.source:
***Outline what you'll do based on the previous questions and follow the plan.***
***You might choose to step back from the charts if it's your third loss in a row.***
***Or you might want to continue trading if it's the first one.***
***What will you pay attention to? How will you behave?***
ast.target:
***根据前面的问题概述你将要做什么，并遵循计划。***
***如果这是你连续第三次亏损，你可能会选择暂时远离图表。***
***或者如果是第一次亏损，你可能想继续交易。***
***你会关注什么？你会如何表现？***

ast.name: content
ast.source:
# **[1.7.9] - 2026/06/15**
Prepared Journalit for Obsidian plugin submission with a bunch of fixes, cleanup, and minor UI polish.
ast.target: # **[1.7.9] - 2026/06/15**\n为 Obsidian 插件提交做了准备，包含大量修复、清理和少量 UI 优化。

ast.name: content
ast.source:
# **1.6.6**
Small hotfix release for account page stability.

## **Fixes**
- Fixed account modal field style scoping
- Improved account page visual consistency

@Update Alerts
ast.target:
# **1.6.6**
针对账户页面稳定性的小型热修复版本。

## **修复**
- 修复了账户模态框字段样式作用域问题
- 提升了账户页面视觉一致性

@更新提醒

ast.name: content
ast.target: # **1.6.3-beta.6**\n针对 Obsidian 移动端登录的热修复。\n

ast.name: content
ast.source:
# **1.6.3-beta.3**
Hotfix updates.

## **Fixes**
- Fixed issue with image paths when creating trades
- Translated review templates and polished Russian labels

@Update Alerts
ast.target:
# **1.6.3-beta.3**
热修复更新。

## **修复**
- 修复了创建交易时图片路径的问题
- 翻译了审阅模板并优化了俄语标签

@更新提醒

ast.name: content
ast.source:
# 1.4.2-beta.3

## Hotfix: Folder Migration System

- Removed automatic folder migration code when changing Journalit folder location in vault
- Replaced with manual move of existing files
- New trades will automatically be created in new folder location of choice
ast.target:
# 1.4.2-beta.3

## 热修复：文件夹迁移系统

- 移除了在保险库中更改 Journalit 文件夹位置时的自动文件夹迁移代码
- 替换为手动移动现有文件
- 新交易将自动创建在选择的新文件夹位置

ast.name: description
ast.source: Copy trading, better media support, new dashboard metrics, automatic commissions, and a lot of accuracy/UI fixes.
ast.target: 复制交易、更好的媒体支持、新的仪表板指标、自动佣金以及大量准确性/UI 修复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Weekly review improvements, plus hotfixes for trade note loading, Review V2 syncing, and dashboard partial-exit metrics.
ast.target: 每周审阅改进，以及交易笔记加载、Review V2 同步和仪表板部分平仓指标的热修复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Review context, calendar upgrades, account visibility, multi-currency reviews, and reliability fixes.
ast.target: 审阅上下文、日历升级、账户可见性、多币种审阅和可靠性修复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Previous-period comparisons, previous DRC context, custom field improvements, and analytics fixes.
ast.target: 上期对比、先前 DRC 上下文、自定义字段改进和分析修复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Privacy Mode, full French/German translations, weekly review upgrades, and a batch of dashboard/layout fixes.
ast.target: 隐私模式、完整的法语/德语翻译、每周审阅升级以及一批仪表板/布局修复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trade Log improvements, review template upgrades, navigation fixes, and dashboard polish.
ast.target: 交易日志改进、审阅模板升级、导航修复和仪表板优化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Navigation, drawdown analytics, and trade journaling improvements, with major quality-of-life fixes across dashboard and filters.
ast.target: 导航、回撤分析和交易日志改进，以及仪表板和过滤器的重大生活质量修复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trade Log upgrades, review workflow improvements, dashboard insights, and under-the-hood trade reliability work.
ast.target: 交易日志升级、审阅工作流改进、仪表板洞察以及底层交易可靠性工作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Custom trade fields, Home account filtering and manual trade/import fixes
ast.target: 自定义交易字段、主页账户过滤以及手动交易/导入修复

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trade type switching fixes, Obsidian compatibility hardening, and public submission polish.
ast.target: 交易类型切换修复、Obsidian 兼容性加固和公开提交优化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: MetaTrader HTML import support, more accurate risk handling for missed/backtest trades, and backend sync cleanup.
ast.target: MetaTrader HTML 导入支持、针对错过/回测交易的更准确风险处理以及后端同步清理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Contract spec fixes, dashboard stability improvements, and safer trade sync behavior.
ast.target: 合约规格修复、仪表板稳定性改进和更安全的交易同步行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Major CSV import upgrades, new review/dashboard analytics, and reliability fixes across trade workflows.
ast.target: 重大 CSV 导入升级、新的审阅/仪表板分析以及交易工作流的可靠性修复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: New CSV import support, import accuracy fixes, and dashboard metric improvements.
ast.target: 新的 CSV 导入支持、导入准确性修复和仪表板指标改进。

ast.name: description
ast.source: New import options, smoother first-run experience, and more accurate stats across the dashboard and home widgets.
ast.target: 新的导入选项、更顺畅的首次运行体验，以及仪表板和主页小部件更准确的统计数据。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 针对 Obsidian 移动端登录的热修复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trade form improvements, FX Replay CSV import support, and a batch of stability fixes.
ast.target: 交易表单改进、FX Replay CSV 导入支持以及一批稳定性修复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: CSV import improvements, account rename reliability, and stability fixes.
ast.target: CSV 导入改进、账户重命名可靠性和稳定性修复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Stability fixes across review widgets, CSV imports, trade images, and IBKR reconciliation.
ast.target: 审阅小部件、CSV 导入、交易图片和 IBKR 对账的稳定性修复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expanded language coverage, onboarding revamp, multi-currency upgrades, and new broker imports.
ast.target: 扩展语言覆盖范围、入门流程改造、多币种升级和新的经纪商导入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Multi-currency support, new trade metrics, and quality-of-life improvements.
ast.target: 多币种支持、新的交易指标和生活质量改进。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 13 new columns, smarter CSV imports, Hyperliquid & Blofin support
ast.target: 13个新列、更智能的 CSV 导入、Hyperliquid & Blofin 支持

ast.name: description
ast.source: Major release introducing Review V2, customizable Home View, and extensive improvements across the board.
ast.target: 重大版本发布，引入 Review V2、可自定义主页视图以及全面的广泛改进。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Instrument specifications, TradingView import, enhanced dashboard metrics, and critical bug fixes.
ast.target: 工具规格、TradingView 导入、增强的仪表板指标和关键错误修复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bug fixes for daily goals, trade status detection, and TradeLog display
ast.target: 每日目标、交易状态检测和交易日志显示的错误修复

ast.name: description
ast.source: Multi-select, enhanced filtering, and performance improvements
ast.target: 多选、增强过滤和性能改进

ast.name: description
ast.source: Minor bug fixes and performance improvements
ast.target: 次要错误修复和性能改进

ast.name: description
ast.source: New filtering options across dashboard and TradeLog for better strategy analysis
ast.target: 仪表板和交易日志的新过滤选项，以更好地进行策略分析

ast.name: description
ast.source: Major update with CSV import system, R-multiple risk tracking, and manual trailing drawdown
ast.target: 重大更新：新增CSV导入系统、R倍数风险追踪及手动回撤跟踪功能

ast.name: description
ast.source: Faster sync and improved UI responsiveness
ast.target: 更快的同步速度与更优的界面响应性

ast.name: description
ast.source: Simplified folder location changes with manual file moving
ast.target: 简化文件夹位置更改，支持手动移动文件

ast.name: description
ast.source: Complete account filtering across review components and customisable journal folder location
ast.target: 全面的账户筛选功能，覆盖所有复盘组件，并支持自定义交易日志文件夹位置

ast.name: description
ast.source: Complete drag-and-drop home page with widgets and backtest trade support
ast.target: 完整的拖放式主页，包含小部件和回测交易支持

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid share code format. Must start with JRT-
ast.target: 分享码格式无效。必须以 JRT- 开头

ast.target: 分享码格式无效。应为 JRT-{版本}-{数据}

ast.name: error
ast.target: 分享码超出最大长度限制（50KB）

ast.source: Failed to decode share code. Data may be corrupted.
ast.target: 解码分享码失败。数据可能已损坏。

ast.source: Invalid template: missing or invalid name field
ast.target: 无效模板：缺少或无效的名称字段

ast.target: 无效模板：缺少或无效的类型字段

ast.source: Invalid trade template: missing or invalid sections field
ast.target: 无效的交易模板：缺少或无效的区块字段

ast.name: error

ast.target: 无效的交易模板：缺少或无效的显示字段

ast.name: error

ast.target: 无效模板：缺少或无效的小部件字段

ast.name: message
ast.source: Aborted due to condition callback returning false.
ast.target: 因条件回调返回 false 而中止。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Sign-in timed out. Please close this window and try again.
ast.target: 登录超时。请关闭此窗口并重试。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Something went wrong. Please close this window and try signing in again.
ast.target: 出现问题。请关闭此窗口并尝试重新登录。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Connection lost. Please check your internet and try again.
ast.target: 连接中断。请检查您的网络连接并重试。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unable to read trade frontmatter before canonical execution migration
ast.target: 无法在规范执行迁移前读取交易前置数据

ast.name: message
ast.source: Name must be 3-50 characters and contain only letters, numbers, spaces, and hyphens
ast.target: 名称长度必须为3-50个字符，且只能包含字母、数字、空格和连字符

ast.name: message
ast.source: Color must be a valid hex color code (e.g. #FF0000)
ast.target: 颜色必须是有效的十六进制颜色代码（例如 #FF0000）

ast.name: message
ast.source: Order must be a non-negative integer

ast.name: name
ast.target: Micro E-Mini 纳斯达克100指数

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: How are you feeling about this loss?
ast.target: 对于这次亏损，你的感受如何？

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: What went well that you can repeat?
ast.target: 有哪些做得好的地方可以重复？

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: What went wrong and how will you improve?
ast.target: 哪里出了问题，你将如何改进？

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 你的下一步计划是什么？

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Any additional thoughts about this trade?
ast.target: 关于这笔交易，还有其他想法吗？

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: What did you do right in this trade?
ast.target: 在这笔交易中，你做对了什么？

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: What would you do differently next time?
ast.target: 下次你会做哪些不同的事情？

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: What is the main takeaway from this trade?
ast.target: 从这笔交易中得到的主要启示是什么？

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: What aspects of your strategy or execution led to this win?
ast.target: 你的策略或执行中的哪些方面促成了这次盈利？

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Can you consistently replicate what made this trade successful?
ast.target: 你能否持续复制促成这笔交易成功的因素？

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: What caused this loss? Was it execution, analysis, or market conditions?
ast.target: 这次亏损的原因是什么？是执行、分析还是市场条件？

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: What specific changes will you make to prevent this type of loss?
ast.target: 你将采取哪些具体改变来防止此类亏损？

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: What is the main takeaway from this loss?
ast.target: 从这次亏损中得到的主要启示是什么？

ast.name: text
ast.source: What are the things you're most proud about?
ast.target: 你最引以为豪的事情是什么？

ast.name: text
ast.source: What were the three biggest challenges you overcame successfully?
ast.target: 你成功克服的三大挑战是什么？

ast.name: text
ast.source: What tools did you use to overcome these challenges?
ast.target: 你使用了哪些工具来克服这些挑战？

ast.name: text
ast.source: What were the areas in which you failed to show your full potential?
ast.target: 在哪些方面你未能展现出全部潜力？

ast.name: text
ast.source: What practical steps will you take to minimize this gap?
ast.target: 你将采取哪些实际步骤来缩小这一差距？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Three things to reinforce & Three areas of improvement
ast.target: 三个需要强化的方面 & 三个需要改进的领域

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you had goals for this year, did you achieve them? How challenging were they?
ast.target: 如果你今年有目标，你实现了吗？这些目标有多具挑战性？

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you failed to meet your goals, explain why.
ast.target: 如果你未能达成目标，请解释原因。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Did this year prove everything I've got, or did I leave potential untapped?
ast.target: 今年是否证明了我已竭尽全力，还是我仍有潜力未被发掘？

ast.name: text
ast.source: How can I remove the gap between what I delivered and what I'm capable of delivering next year?
ast.target: 明年我如何能缩小我所交付的成果与我所能交付的成果之间的差距？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Did you make a net profit this year? (Net of any expenses)
ast.target: 你今年实现净利润了吗？（扣除任何费用后）

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you failed to make a profit, what do you believe is the single biggest reason why?
ast.target: 如果你未能盈利，你认为最主要的原因是什么？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Is there any way you can reduce costs to improve your bottom line?
ast.target: 是否有办法降低成本以提高你的利润底线？

ast.name: text
ast.source: What was your biggest win streak of the year?
ast.target: 你今年最长的连胜纪录是多少？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Review the trade that broke the win streak. Did you find anything interesting?
ast.target: 回顾终结连胜的那笔交易。你有什么有趣的发现吗？

ast.name: text
ast.source: What was your biggest drawdown of the year?
ast.target: 你今年最大的回撤是多少？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Review the trade that broke the losing streak. Did you find anything interesting?
ast.target: 回顾终结连败的那笔交易。你有什么有趣的发现吗？

ast.name: text
ast.source: When you review your trades from this year, did you find any consistently recurring issues?
ast.target: 当你回顾今年的交易时，是否发现任何持续反复出现的问题？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Was there a type of trade that did/didn't work well?
ast.target: 是否存在某种类型的交易效果好/不好？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Was there a particular ticker that you did/didn't trade well?
ast.target: 是否存在某个特定的标的，你交易得好/不好？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Was there a particular day/time that you did/didn't trade well?
ast.target: 是否存在某个特定的日期/时间，你交易得好/不好？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Did you enter trades too soon/too late?

ast.name: text
ast.source: Did you take profit too soon/too late?
ast.target: 你是否过早/过晚获利了结？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Were your stops too loose/too tight?
ast.target: 你的止损设置得太宽/太紧了吗？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Did you take poor risk/reward trades?
ast.target: 你是否进行了风险回报比不佳的交易？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Did you risk too much/too little?
ast.target: 你是否承担了过多/过少的风险？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Did you miss any trades? How did this affect your bottom line?
ast.target: 你是否错过了任何交易？这对你的利润底线有何影响？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Did you deviate from your plan? If so, why? What was the outcome?
ast.target: 你是否偏离了计划？如果是，为什么？结果如何？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Why do I have this problem?
ast.target: 我为什么会有这个问题？

ast.name: text
ast.source: How can I do more of what worked?
ast.target: 我如何能更多地做那些有效的事情？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Have you kept to a routine that keeps you present and focused during key trading hours?
ast.target: 你是否坚持了一个能让你在关键交易时段保持专注和清醒的例行程序？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Are there processes you feel would improve your performance, but you aren't actively implementing them?
ast.target: 是否有你认为能提升表现，但并未积极实施的流程？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Are there habits you feel are detrimental to your performance, yet you still engage in them anyway?
ast.target: 是否有你认为对表现有害，但你仍然在做的习惯？

ast.name: text
ast.source: What distractions caused you to miss the most opportunities for trading this year?
ast.target: 今年，哪些干扰因素导致你错过了最多的交易机会？

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you could rewind this year, what advice would you give yourself knowing what you know now?
ast.target: 如果能重来今年，以你现在的认知，你会给自己什么建议？

ast.name: text
ast.source: What are your goals for next year?

ast.name: text
ast.source: What processes will be put in place to ensure you meet next year's goals?
ast.target: 将采取哪些流程来确保你实现明年的目标？

ast.name: text
ast.target: 严格遵守我的交易计划

ast.name: text
ast.target: 只等待 A+ 级别的交易机会
